entry.title: New IDC HSFEHQ12D0879 awarded to AECOM RECOVERY for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TO PROVIDE ARCHITECH AND ENGINEER SERVICE TO THE PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAM.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSFEHQ12D0879 (P00005) awarded to AECOM RECOVERY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD MONIQUE WADDELL AND SEAN WILLIAMS AS CONTRACTING OFFICERS WITH SIGNATURE AUTHORITY. THE PURPOSE OF THIS CONTRACT IS TO PROVIDE PROFESSIONAL SERVICE SUPPORT TO THE PUBLIC ASSISTANCE OPERATIONS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSFEHQ12D0879 (P00007) awarded to AECOM RECOVERY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REASSIGN MR. EDDIE MURPHY FROM THE PRIMARY COR POSITION TO THE SECONDARY ALTERNATE COR POSITION. MS. DONNA BANKS IS ASSIGNED THE PRIMARY COR RESPONSIBLITIES AND MS. SHERRY SAVOY RETAINS THE FIRST ALTERNATE COR ROLE.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSFEHQ12D0879 (P00009) awarded to AECOM RECOVERY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXERCISE OPTION PERIOD 3 OF THE CONTRACT, UPDATE THE RE-NEGOTIATED MANAGEMENT AND ADMINISTRATION (M&A) RATES FOR OPTION PERIODS: II, III AND IV, AND ASSIGN NEW CONTRACTING OFFICER AND CONTRACT SPECIALIST FOR THE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
